ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "length" TEXT /* Duration of the course (e.g., 1-2 hours) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time slot for the course (e.g., 8am-10:00pm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course format */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location for in-person courses */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of trainees that can enroll in the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES course_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES course_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the instructor */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the instructor based on trainee feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was assigned to the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainees" (
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainee */,
  "trainee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the trainee belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the trainee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the trainee was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being selected */,
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainee selecting the course */,
  "selection_date" TEXT /* Date the trainee selected the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the selection (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the course selection */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the trainee selected the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_selections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_selections_trainee_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainee_id") REFERENCES trainees ("trainee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration for the type of course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
column_names: Maximum number of trainees that can enroll in the course
Average rating of the instructor based on trainee feedback
ID of the course being taught
ID of the instructor teaching the course
Date the instructor was assigned to the course
Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive)
Additional notes or comments about the assignment
ID of the course being selected
ID of the trainee selecting the course
Date the trainee selected the course
Status of the selection (e.g., pending, confirmed)
Reason why the trainee selected the course
Typical duration for the type of course
